scripts.test:regression: npm run test:circular && tsc src/mocap/solvers/solverHeuristics.ts src/mocap/trackers/boneTrackState.ts src/mocap/solvers/anatomicalDepth.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --rootDir src/mocap --outDir .tmp-regression --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && tsc src/validation/boneConstraints.ts src/validation/clipValidator.ts src/diagnostics/skeletonLogger.ts --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --rootDir src --outDir .tmp-regression --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f='.tmp-regression/validation/clipValidator.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(\"from './boneConstraints'\",\"from './boneConstraints.js'\"))" && node --test tests/regression/solverHeuristics.test.mjs tests/regression/clipValidator.test.mjs tests/regression/bvhRoundtripMath.test.mjs tests/regression/skeletonLogger.test.mjs tests/regression/boneTrackState.test.mjs tests/regression/anatomicalDepth.test.mjs
